content:
# Marfa̧ą́k AI Security - out xss attr txt

**WARN̊̈̂ING: Thï̈s payload tests out x̀ss attr txt.**


**WARNĮNG: Thĩs payload ẗ̈est̊̊̊s out xss attr tx̧̊̀t.**


Oh́, attribute-b̧ased XSS. The c̨̈lassic that nev̧́er gets old. Inje̊̈ct ä̧̊ mà̧̀licioų̃s payļ́ồ̈ad̂̀ thr̨̂̃oų̧gh thę̃̃ src attribute of an img tag.

```html
<imǵ̀ ŝrc=x onerror="alerţ(doc̀̈umęnt.cookie)">
```

Becaúse not̀̈̈h̊ing̊ saÿs "Ï̧̀ found this in å̈́ hackinĝ̨̀ tutorial fr̨̈̊ǫ́̂m 2005" like using imĝ onerror. *ŷ̈awns*

At least tŗ̨̈y somẽ́̈thì̧ng ǫrį́̊ginal lik̊̊̀e...
```html
<ş̂̊vg onload=javasĉript:alert(1)>
```

Malicioûs XS̨̈Ś̨ at́̀̈tribute inject̂ion attac̀́k.
